I love turning complexity into clarity — and strategy into action that creates real impact.

From Jutland, Denmark — moving to Copenhagen in August +45 24 22 28 26 isabellkk@me.com linkedin.com/in/isabellkristensen Student Assistant · Strategy & Portfolio
The charms that shaped me
Click a charm to hear its story
Charm 01

The Curious Mind

That started it all

I've always been curious about how things work beneath the surface — especially the "why" behind the numbers and the decisions they drive. That curiosity is what led me to economics, and later to a Bachelor's in Business Administration at Aarhus University, which I finished with a 10.1 average. It's still what drives how I work today: I rarely stop at what the data shows — I want to understand what's behind it, and what it means for the decision that follows.

Charm 02

The Leap

Stepping out of my comfort zone

During my Bachelor's I challenged myself by studying abroad at the University of Sydney, completing 30 ECTS alongside close to 180 students from around the world — and placed among the top 10 in Business Negotiation. It pushed me to grow, both personally and professionally, and taught me that the best opportunities start when we dare to step outside what's familiar. It's a lesson I still carry into every new challenge, including this one.

Charm 03

The Strategist

Turning data into direction

At Systemate, an IT solutions provider for the energy and utilities sector, I was given independent responsibility for a comprehensive market analysis of Norway, Sweden and Finland — assessing where a new software product had the strongest potential, and which go-to-market strategy would create the most value. I gathered and structured large amounts of information on regulation, market conditions, customers and competitors in a market shaped by complex structures and many stakeholders, and turned it into clear conclusions and concrete recommendations for management — much the same way I imagine preparing material for portfolio reviews, tracking strategic initiatives, risks and dependencies for Pandora's leadership.

Charm 04

The Builder

Creating impact with technology

I also took the initiative to develop a digital platform that identifies and structures relevant public tenders — making it easier for the business to get an overview and make qualified, prioritised decisions. Building it taught me how much value good technology creates when it's designed around the people who'll actually use it, and gave me a real understanding of process, data and the business consequences of different choices. It's the same instinct I'd bring to supporting business analysis and turning findings into clear presentation material at Pandora.

Charm 05

The Communicator

Turning communication into engagement

As a reformer instructor at LAVA Reformer Studio, I plan and lead group training every week for participants with very different levels and backgrounds. I have to communicate clearly, read the room, adapt my message to my audience, and create an environment that feels safe, energising and motivating. It's the same skill set I'd bring to facilitating D&T onboarding sessions and bootcamps for new joiners, or preparing material for townhalls and leadership events — knowing an audience and adapting the message accordingly.

Charm 06

The Dream

Why Pandora

I've always been drawn to consumer products — especially fashion and design. There's something magical about being part of a brand that creates meaningful moments and stories for millions of people. Pandora combines exactly what I'm looking for: a strategic, fast-paced environment inside Digital & Technology, a brand with real global reach, and the chance to help link strategy to execution as part of the Strategy, Portfolio & Partnering team. I'd love to build the next chapter of my journey here.

“

Isabell has a pronounced analytical mindset and a strong ability to quickly get to grips with new and complex issues. She works systematically, is thorough in her research, and takes a critical view of both sources and conclusions — and she follows every task through to the door.

Reading the job posting
Where I think I fit

What Pandora is looking for

Currently enrolled in a relevant degree, ideally starting a Master's
Strong PowerPoint & Excel skills
Familiarity with AI tools like Copilot or Claude
Experience with projects or project coordination
Analytical, structured, proactive, a strong communicator
Fluent in English

What I bring

Starting MSc in Finance & Strategic Management at CBS, Sept. 2026 (BSc from Aarhus, 10.1 average)
Daily use of PowerPoint & Excel building analyses and leadership presentations at Systemate
Use Copilot and Claude regularly — and built an AI-supported tender platform myself
Led a full market analysis project and a digital platform build end to end
Confirmed by my manager — plus weekly practice reading a room as a group instructor
Fluent English, native Danish, basic German — plus a semester abroad in Sydney

Who I am

  • Analytical, structured and detail-oriented
  • I thrive on understanding the "why" behind the numbers
  • I take ownership and drive things forward
  • A team player with strong communication skills
  • I bring positive energy and a can-do attitude to everything I do

What I bring

  • Hands-on experience with strategy execution, portfolio support and business analysis
  • Skilled in creating presentations and insights that engage and drive action
  • Experience with AI tools (Copilot, Claude, etc.) and building digital solutions
  • Comfortable in fast-paced environments where priorities change and impact matters

Why Pandora

  • A world-leading brand with strong values and a clear purpose
  • A chance to work with strategy, portfolio and transformation in a global organisation
  • An inspiring environment where creativity, collaboration and innovation come together
  • A place where I can grow, contribute and make a real difference

“I'm excited about the opportunity to contribute my skills, energy and curiosity to help turn strategy into action and create value at Pandora.”

ISABELL KAROLINE KRISTENSEN · APPLICATION FOR STUDENT ASSISTANT, STRATEGY & PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT
